package.name: baxter_pnp_enterprise
package.description:
Enterprise-grade Baxter Pick-and-Place system based on BehaviorTree.CPP v4.
Architecture (Three-Layer): - Hardware Interface Layer : Baxter SDK wrapper with lifecycle management - Skill Layer : BehaviorTree.CPP Action / Condition nodes - Decision Layer : BT XML defining the PnP workflow
Key enterprise features: - Multi-threaded callback processing via ros::AsyncSpinner - Thread-safe shared state with std::mutex / std::lock_guard - Actionlib-based motion control (non-blocking) - diagnostic_updater for hardware health monitoring - dynamic_reconfigure for runtime parameter tuning - Structured logging with rosconsole macros - Graceful shutdown and error recovery
Author : Robotics Team Maintainer: candidate@example.com
